ubuntu:18.04.reason: Ubuntu 18.04 is End-of-Life (EOL) and no longer receives security updates.

latest.reason: The ':latest' tag is mutable. An unexpected update could break your build or introduce vulnerabilities. Pin to a specific version.

curl | sh.reason: Piping curl directly to a shell allows unverified remote code execution during build.

wget | sh.reason: Piping wget directly to a shell allows unverified remote code execution during build.
